steps.assistant_text: Three-stage sub-object finalize/validate (kernel, 0xDC / 55 insns). Dead-#else harvest: the matching body sat in a dead `#else / #ifdef NON_MATCHING` branch (never compiled) while the build path was INCLUDE_ASM; the active #ifdef-NON_MATCHING body above it (return-on-failure-before-commit form) was the wrong shape. The dead body's structure matches the target's beql branch-likely chain: for each non-NULL handle slot (0x54/0x50/0x4C) it calls func_80001EDC(self, handle, paramA, paramB) (4 args, a0=self in s0), runs func_80000518(handle, paramC) ALWAYS (commit emitted in the `beql s1,0,next` delay slot, i.e. BEFORE the failure test), then tests temp_s1 and returns -0xE/-0xF/-0x10 on failure. Promoted the dead body to the active path and unwrapped. Linked ROM byte-identical to baserom (`cmp tenshoe.z64 baserom.z64` clean); build/.o vs expected/.o: 0 non-reloc word diffs, reloc-set MATCH (6 relocs: func_80001EDC x3, func_80000518 x3).
